programme.title: Renovation Resort
programme.desc: Scott and Bryan head out for their annual fishing showdown; teams dive into their kitchens and dining areas; unexpected storage challenges test their creativity and with the clock ticking, temperatures rise between teammates; unexpected obstacles force teams to make tough decisions, and mounting setbacks threaten to derail even the strongest plans; guest judge Debra Salmoni steps in to help determine who brought the heat in the kitchen.

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: Two British families set up shop in Spain to sell property to Britain families looking for a bit of fun in the sun.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Fitting In and Family Fun in Phuket
programme.desc: A South African family relocates for a change of pace and so their daughter can spend time with her grandparents in Thailand; they're hoping a relaxed island lifestyle will benefit everyone, but coping with culture shock may be a challenge.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Interior Design Masters
programme.desc: Arriving at the studio, Michelle reveals that for their next project, they'll be working solo; she reveals that each will have a luxury holiday lodge to upgrade, including an open plan kitchen, living and dining space and an outside terrace.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Previous $1 million winners call on David to help find a second dream home near Nashville; they're looking for a picturesque place that's quiet and close to family, but the hardest part is deciding on a house while performing their happy dance.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Santa delivers big when a Massachusetts couple finally scratches off a $4 million win on Christmas Day; they want a vacation spot that can eventually be their retirement home, so they're enlisting David to find the perfect place.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Armed with large bank accounts and fantasies of living in mansions bigger than city blocks, lottery winners search for new homes.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Armed with large bank accounts and fantasies of living in mansions bigger than city blocks, lottery winners search for new homes.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: For someone who rarely plays the lottery, a single dad strikes it lucky when a scratcher wins him $10 million; after taking care of his loved ones, he turns to David to find a family dream home with a sparkling pool in Visalia, Calif.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A couple scratch off a $2 million winner and are ready to escape the heat of Florida summers; they send David on the hunt for a big holiday cabin in the Blue Ridge Mountains of Georgia.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A couple got married in Hawaii 18 years ago, and after winning $5 million on a scratcher, they're moving to the Big Island; with a huge budget, David searches for properties with ocean views, and takes in the Big Kona energy along the way.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: When a Pennsylvanian woman receives an inheritance, it gives her the opportunity to move to the warm shores of Myrtle Beach, S.C.; David helps her and her bestie navigate beach real estate to find her forever home.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A couple living in her grandmother's tiny two-bedroom house have never had the means to buy their own home -- until they win $1 million on a scratch-off; David searches Akron, Ohio, for a home with a big yard and enough space to host band practice.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Thanks to an inheritance, a longtime Georgia resident has the chance to buy a large family home closer to her grown-up children in Lubbock, Texas; David shows her some beautiful, spacious places where the houses are big, but the prices are small.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A couple battling an illness was in a terrible place financially and physically, so when they scratched a million dollars, they knew it was the answer to their prayers; David steps in to help find the perfect place for them to recuperate.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: First cousins and BFFs grew up like sisters, so when one gets the chance to buy a family home, the other gets a room of her own and a bathtub; on David's first trip to Memphis, and he searches for the grand, sprawling house of their dreams.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home
programme.desc: Over the years, a couple's home has become the family hub for holidays and celebrations, but the closed-off layout cramps their entertaining and everyday style.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home
programme.desc: A couple buys a small, two-bedroom home before unexpectedly having children; Drew and Jonathan rethink their cramped layout so this miracle family can stay in the home they love.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home
programme.desc: A family's entire life revolves around cycling, but their house doesn't support their active lifestyle; Drew and Jonathan take on the challenge of transforming the house into a forever home that works both on and off a bicycle.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home
programme.desc: After having two kids, the major overhaul needed to create a couple's forever home hasn't happened; they call on Drew and Jonathan to make their spaces function for their needs before they adopt a second rescue puppy.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home
programme.desc: A couple bought her childhood home and the outdated layout and decor aren't working for their family; Drew and Jonathan rework the dining room, kitchen and living room, and take on a special project for their twins.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Property Brothers: Forever Home
programme.desc: A couple looked at over 50 houses before finding the one, and they want to maximize every square inch to make it their forever home; Drew and Jonathan tackle the main floor and deck to give them their dream home, inside and out.

programme.desc: Robert loves his family's mid-century cabin in the woods, but now that the family has grown, wife Jennifer is starting to feel claustrophobic and frustrated with the lack of space.

programme.title: Life Is Messy
programme.desc: After moving into their three-bedroom forever home, Catherine and Rob found out they were pregnant again and immediately felt the squeeze; managing three kids, two large dogs, and nightly musical beds, exhaustion has taken over and their home has descended into total chaos; Kortney and Kenny devise solutions with the grown-ups and the kids to bring back the beauty and the calm, so their house can stay their forever home.

programme.title: The Block Australia
programme.desc: Teams compete to see who can renovate houses on Phillip Island for the most profit, as the properties are placed on auction soon after refurbishments are completed.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.sub-title: Big Change on Sydney's Northern Beaches
programme.desc: A California couple looks to relocate to her native Sydney, Australia; their homecoming comes with a lot of moving pieces, however, as they face new jobs, high price tags and big expectations -- all on a budget.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Love It or List It
programme.desc: A family of seven is cramped in their home; Hilary and her team create an open-concept living area and add more space and storage to encourage them to stay; however, David sets out to find other options for the ever-growing crew.

programme.desc: Brian is fed up with the lack of space and basement problems in his and Chelsea's small lakeside bungalow; Hilary and her team are determined to make this house function, but David hopes to find the couple a larger home.

programme.title: Timber Kings
programme.desc: Beat's schedule is thrown by German customs; Bryan Sr. and Peter harvest 200-foot trees.

programme.title: Timber Kings
programme.desc: Beat sets logs in the rain; a priest convinces Bryan Sr. and Peter to build a gazebo for free; André and Joel take a float plane to buy $500,000 worth of logs.

programme.title: Timber Kings
programme.desc: André goes to Ontario to lead his first build in six years; Beat has to collaborate; Peter is determined to get a vacation out of Bryan Jr.

programme.title: Timber Kings
programme.desc: Bryan Sr. resurrects an ancient crane dubbed "Rust Bucket" to complete a remote fishing cabin; Beat struggles with two huge projects competing for time and square footage on the work yard.

programme.title: Timber Kings
programme.desc: Tensions run high when Andre muscles in on Sam's build in Kansas; winter gales put a chill on Peter's project for a Russian client.

programme.title: Timber Kings
programme.desc: Joel hopes a contract for four cabins in Michigan will lead to an order for 16 more; Andre's kitchen renovation becomes more complicated than expected.

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: With new scenes, Lyndsay and Leslie turn closets into a bedroom and take their cousin's house from DIY-gone-wrong to polished and natural; in a totally new house, the twins take on an entry and living room reno using only wallpaper and styling.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: High school sweethearts turn to their friends Lyndsay and Leslie to help sell their old tri-level home in a neighborhood of new builds; the twins update the home with a warm, minimalist style; Lyndsay makes plans with her own sweetheart.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: Leslie and Lyndsay are on a mission to convert a couple's sprawling home into a nest egg; seeing the potential for a big sale, they use all their tricks to give the massive rooms with wood features and dated mirrors a modern, luxurious overhaul.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: The twins tackle a double design with a brand-new renovation of a tangled '90s kitchen; Lyndsay and Leslie redo a cottage rental into a gorgeous starter home with a stylish retro feel for a military family.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: While looking for an old friend, Leslie and Lyndsay meet fellow VW enthusiasts who struggle to sell a house they built 15 years ago; the twins update the home's builder-grade materials and add darker finishes for an elegant twist on farmhouse style.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: Three generations of women are eager to sell their over-customized and unfinished 1950s rambler before they find a new place near the ocean; Lyndsay and Leslie introduce the Zen-like qualities of cottagecore style to create a cozy home like no other.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: The twins take a dated kitchen and restore it with a craftsman-but-modern style; with never-before-seen footage, including a new room, a risky remote cabin gets a midcentury modern makeover to make a lumberjack blush.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: A couple of the twins' longtime friends need help updating their mother's rambler for sale; while Leslie worries that the colorful and eclectic design plan will repel buyers, Lyndsay gets a second opinion from Keith Bynum and Evan Thomas.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unsellable Houses
programme.desc: A couple want to sell their 1970s rambler and get started on their dream retirement, but their wood-paneled home with only one bathroom needs work.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Life Is Messy
programme.desc: Shanelle is tired of feeling like a teenager. As a single mom living temporarily in her father's home, she and her son Elijah are feeling boxed in. Their footprint is limited to three bedrooms, including one for her home business, but they are all bursting at the seams with years of clutter, clothing and nail tech gear. Kortney and Kenny reimagine the life they could live, creating two beautiful bedrooms and a stunning nail salon that will get business booming.

programme.title: That Thrifting Show with Lara Spencer
programme.desc: Lara Spencer doles out a dining room challenge in an English Cottage vs. Modern Glam faceoff. From travertine to bold stripes, they race to create high-end spaces in just two days--each with a very different vision.
